title: Bug: batch only saves 1 of N videos — 3 root causes
description: 3 root causes: (1) get_transcript() returns no video_title key — fell back to 'Video {id}' always. Fixed: call get_video_title() explicitly. (2) free-tier cap check ran per-video inside loop — after first upsert count tipped over limit, second video blocked silently. Fixed: count once before loop, track slots_used inside. (3) upsert on_conflict included wrong 'format' column, Supabase raised constraint error swallowed by outer except. Fixed: removed format from payload and conflict clause. Related to Phase 4 backend.

title: Frontend: highlight rendering in SavedItemModal
description: Update SavedItemModal.tsx: (1) Add data-segment-index attrs to transcript segment divs. (2) Add mouseup selection handler scoped to modal container ref, skip if pointer:coarse. (3) Capture segment_index + char_start/char_end from DOM range on save. (4) Render yellow marks in transcript segments and summary text using char offsets. Wire HighlightTooltip and useHighlights. See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md.

title: Frontend: highlights API client + useHighlights hook
description: Create web-app/src/utils/highlights.ts (API calls: POST/GET/DELETE) and web-app/src/hooks/useHighlights.ts (fetch on modal open, addHighlight, removeHighlight, loading/error states per operation). See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md.

title: Frontend: HighlightTooltip component
description: Create web-app/src/components/HighlightTooltip.tsx. Two modes via prop: mode='new' shows [Highlight][x], mode='existing' shows [Remove]. Position via getBoundingClientRect() relative to modal container ref (not document). Dismiss on click outside. See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md.

title: Backend: highlights expiry + deletion cleanup
description: Two changes: (1) Update cleanup_expired_items.py to delete expired highlights same pass as saved_items — same lt('expires_at') query on highlights table. (2) Update delete_all_video_items in saved_items.py (line ~229) to also delete all highlights for that video_id + user_id. See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md expiry section.

title: Backend: highlights API endpoints
description: Create backend/app/routes/highlights.py with 3 endpoints: POST /api/highlights (save), GET /api/highlights/{video_id} (fetch all for video), DELETE /api/highlights/{id} (remove). Follow saved_items.py patterns: get_current_user dependency, Pydantic models, supabase admin client. Set expires_at same value as parent saved_item (30 days free, NULL premium). Register router in main.py. See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md.

title: DB migration: highlights table
description: Create highlights table in Supabase for MVP text highlighting feature. Schema: id, user_id, video_id, selected_text, source_type (transcript|summary), segment_index, char_start, char_end, summary_format, expires_at, created_at. RLS policy: users manage own highlights. Index on (user_id, video_id). See backend/docs/notes_feature_plan.md for full schema.

title: Investigate: Transcript tab still visible in batch item modal
description: isBatch guard exists in SavedItemModal.tsx (line 957) and is committed in aa51f98. User reports Transcript tab still showing for batch items on both local and production. Code review shows: isBatch = item?.source === 'batch'; guard wraps Transcript button with {!isBatch && ...}. Suspicion: item.source is not 'batch' at runtime — either Supabase source constraint (mintclip-02o) rejected the 'batch' value so source is null/default, OR Railway is still on old pre-fix deploy. Need to: (1) verify mintclip-02o constraint migration was run, (2) verify Railway deployed aa51f98 successfully, (3) add console.log to confirm item.source value when batch modal opens.
close_reason: SQL migrations applied via Supabase MCP; Dashboard reduce source-priority bug fixed

title: BatchCard: wire onView to open SavedItemModal
description: BatchCard currently only shows an in-card list of YouTube links when View is clicked. It should open the SavedItemModal with the batch group item (which will have combined segments+text after the batch row fix). Modal already handles source='batch': hides Transcript tab, shows Summary+Chat, defaults to Summary tab.

title: Batch group row: store combined transcript + comma-joined video_ids
description: Currently the batch group row (item_type='batch') only stores groupTitle and a list of {video_id, title}. It needs to store the combined transcript (concatenated segments + text) and use comma-joined video_ids as the row's video_id. This enables summary and chat to work off the full combined context.

title: Bug: Dashboard shows 'Video {id}' for batch items + wrong Transcript badge
description: (1) loadSavedItems() transcript merge block never overwrote videoTitle on grouped item — if non-transcript row processed first, title stayed undefined. Fixed: transcript block always overwrites videoTitle and source from transcript row. (2) Transcript badge showed on batch VideoCards even though tab is hidden. Fixed: hasTranscript guards item.source !== 'batch'. Related to Phase 1 dashboard.

title: Feat: thumbnail grid + Gemini group title in BatchImport results
description: After batch processing completes, results view shows thumbnails in a grid (1→1col, 2→2col, 3→3col, 4→2+2, 5→3+2) using img.youtube.com/vi/{id}/mqdefault.jpg. Backend generates a 4-8 word Gemini title describing the batch, stored in job status as group_title. Related to Phase 1 (Dashboard/BatchImport).

title: Fix: batch saves summary automatically — should be blank
description: Batch background task was auto-generating and saving a 'short' summary to Supabase. Summary tab must start blank; user generates manually. Fix: remove generate_summary call and summary upsert from _process_batch in batch.py. Related to Phase 2 (modal) and Phase 4 (backend).

title: Fix: add 'batch' to saved_items source check constraint
description: Supabase saved_items table has CHECK constraint saved_items_source_check that only allows 'extension' and 'upload'. Batch inserts fail with error: 'new row for relation saved_items violates check constraint saved_items_source_check'. Migration script written at backend/scripts/add_batch_source.sql — needs to be run in Supabase SQL Editor.
close_reason: SQL migrations applied via Supabase MCP; Dashboard reduce source-priority bug fixed

title: Phase 3: BatchImport component
description: New component web-app/src/components/BatchImport.tsx. Props: {urls, onComplete}. Submit calls POST /api/batch/process, polls GET /api/batch/status/{job_id} every 2s. Per-video progress: idle|processing|done|failed. Calls onComplete() on completion.

title: Phase 4: Backend batch routes
description: New file backend/app/routes/batch.py. POST /api/batch/process (require_auth, max 5 URLs, BackgroundTasks, returns job_id). GET /api/batch/status/{job_id}. Background task: extract transcript, generate short summary, upsert to Supabase with source='batch', update_job_progress. Register router in main.py.

title: Phase 2: Modal changes for batch source items
description: Extend source type to include 'batch' in SavedItemModal. isInteractive = source==='upload'||'batch'. Hide Transcript tab for batch items. Default active tab to 'summary' for batch items. Chat tab works unchanged.

title: Phase 1: Dashboard URL input redesign (single/bulk toggle)
description: Add urlMode state ('single'|'bulk'), pill toggle UI, 5 discrete URL input fields in bulk mode with inline validation, 'Process N Videos' button. Extend SavedItem.source type to include 'batch'. Pass onComplete={loadSavedItems} to BatchImport.

title: Fix batch summary save: source='batch', item_type='batch_summary'
description: Batch summaries save with source='upload' and item_type='summary', making them indistinguishable from single-video summaries. Need: (1) widen itemType/source types in api.ts, (2) pass correct source+itemType in SavedItemModal.tsx when isBatch, (3) backend accepts new item_type values, (4) Supabase constraint updated, (5) Dashboard reduce handles new types, (6) batch.py group row uses 'batch_transcript' not 'batch'.
close_reason: Implemented: batch_transcript/batch_summary types in api.ts, SavedItemModal, saved_items.py backend, Dashboard reduce/filter/render, batch.py group row. Supabase migration applied.

title: Commit remaining batch feature files
description: Locally modified/untracked files not yet committed: web-app/src/components/VideoCard.tsx (adds 'batch' to source type), backend/app/main.py (registers batch router), backend/app/routes/batch.py (new batch endpoint), backend/scripts/add_batch_item_type.sql, backend/scripts/add_batch_source.sql, extension/manifest.json, extension/src/background/auth.ts, extension/src/content-scripts/webapp-bridge.ts, extension/src/content/components/ChatTab.tsx, extension/mintclip-extension.zip. User also asked to undo today's 2 commits (b100803, aa51f98) and recommit — paused pending confirmation of scope.

title: Pre-compute Pinecone embeddings for combined batch transcript
description: At end of _process_batch(), after building the combined transcript, call get_or_compute_embeddings(batch_video_id, combined_text) to warm the Redis embedding cache. This means the first chat message in a batch doesn't pay the embedding computation cost.

title: Feat: Clear button in BatchImport resets all URL inputs
description: Added Clear button next to Process button (visible when any input has content) and on results screen (visible after processing, hidden while polling). Resets all URL inputs, errors, results, group title, and cancels any in-flight poll. Related to Phase 1 (BatchImport).

title: Feat: duplicate URL detection in BatchImport with inline warning
description: BatchImport detects duplicate URLs across all 5 fields in real-time. Shows orange warning 'URL(s) N, M are duplicated. Please re-enter.' above buttons. Duplicate URLs excluded from validUrls count and from submission. Related to Phase 1 (BatchImport).

title: Add 'Uploaded' tag to BatchCard
description: BatchCard missing the green 'Uploaded' tag shown on VideoCard for source='upload' items. Batch items also originate from web app import so should show same tag. Fixed by adding matching tag in BatchCard date row.
close_reason: Added green Uploaded tag to BatchCard date row, matching VideoCard style. source='batch' items are web-app imports same as source='upload'.
